#   glyphplotter --input 04A0.txt --output 04A0.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-serif-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200

# ==== Box: U+04A0
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 319 0 /uni04A0
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+04A0"
move 1400
